welcome.title: Velkommen til Cobbleverse
welcome.subtitle: Den ultimative Pokémon-opplevelsen i Minecraft
welcome.username_label: Velg en profil eller legg til en ny
welcome.disclaimer: Ved å klikke på installer godtar du nedlasting av ca. 2 GB data.

install.title: Installasjon
install.done: Alt er installert! Ha det gøy!
install.subtitle: Please wait while we prepare your game...

toast.username_short: Brukernavnet må være minst 3 tegn langt!
toast.username_chars: Bare bokstaver, tall og _ er tillatt!
toast.username_required: Vennligst oppgi et navn for å starte spillet!
toast.profile_selected: {} valgt. Klikk på Spill for å starte!

skin.toast_empty: Vennligst oppgi et navn, lenke eller velg en fil!
skin.toast_saved: Skin lagret og lastet opp til serveren!
skin.multiplayer_hint: I multiplayer brukes skinnet automatisk av SkinsRestorer!
skin.singleplayer_hint: I singleplayer, kjør i spillet: /skin url {}

showcase.title: Pokémon of the Week
showcase.desc_charizard: Legendary Fire/Dragon type, one of the strongest challengers on the server!
showcase.desc_rayquaza: Lord of the skies, a true legend from the Hoenn region!
showcase.desc_greninja: A fast and deadly Water/Dark type ninja Pokémon.
showcase.desc_lucario: Aura master Fighting/Steel type. Can you feel its power?
showcase.desc_gengar: The Ghost/Poison type lurking in the dark, who loves to scare!

rewards.title: Daily Reward
rewards.desc_launcher: Claim your daily free 100 CobbleDollar reward, ready to spend on the server!

leaderboard.title: Hall of Fame
leaderboard.desc: The most active Pokémon masters on the server by playtime.

intro.lang_desc: Hello there! Welcome to the world of Pokemon! Before we begin, is this your preferred language?
intro.pitch_1_desc: This world is inhabited by creatures called Pokemon! For some, Pokemon are pets. Others use them for fights.
intro.pitch_2_desc: Myself... I study Pokemon as a profession. And here, in Cobblemon Universe, adventure awaits everyone!
intro.pitch_3_desc: Are you ready to write your own story? A world of dreams and adventures with Pokemon awaits! Let's go!
intro.choice_desc: Now tell me, are you a new trainer just starting out, or a returning Pokemon Master?
intro.cinematic_2: Jeg er Prof. Oak – alle kaller meg Pokémon-professoren!
intro.cinematic_3: Denne verdenen er bebodd av skapninger kalt Pokémon!
intro.cinematic_4: Jeg studerer disse fascinerende skapningene som yrke.
